title: Cooling with Outdoor Air
full_text:
5.2.2.7 Cooling with Outdoor Air
Cooling with Outdoor Air
1) Except for HVAC systems serving only dwelling units or hotel or motel rooms,
each system that incorporates mechanical cooling and has an air-handling capacity
of more than 1 500 L/s or a cooling capacity of more than 20 kW shall be designed to
use outdoor air to reduce mechanical cooling energy by one of the means covered
in Articles 5.2.2.8. and 5.2.2.9.

sentences.text: Except for HVAC systems serving only dwelling units or hotel or motel rooms, each system that incorporates mechanical cooling and has an air-handling capacity of more than 1 500 L/s or a cooling capacity of more than 20 kW shall be designed to use outdoor air to reduce mechanical cooling energy by one of the means covered in Articles 5.2.2.8. and 5.2.2.9.
